---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Scheduler
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
For substantial features, please open this issue BEFORE sending a pull request
so we can agree on the approach. See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected and why does it matter?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Affected component

Which part of the monorepo would this touch?

- [ ] API (`services/api`)
- [ ] Web (`apps/web`)
- [ ] Scheduling engine (`packages/core`)
- [ ] Android client (`apps/android`)
- [ ] iOS client (`apps/ios`)
- [ ] BYO billing seam
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or any other context about the request.
